expected_doublet_rate.guidance: Expected fraction of doublets. For 10x Chromium: approximately 0.8% per 1,000 cells captured. E.g., 5,000 cells targeted -> ~4% doublets, 10,000 -> ~8%.

n_prin_comps.guidance: Number of principal components for embedding simulated doublets.

sim_doublet_ratio.guidance: Ratio of simulated doublets to observed cells.

validation.check: Doublet rate between 1-15%. If outside this range, inspect the score histogram and consider adjusting the threshold manually.
